# Box SDK

A generated TypeScript SDK for the Box API — a dual ESM/CJS package with
shipped type declarations.

```ts
import { Client, runtime } from '@unofficialbox/box-open-sdk';
const client = new Client(runtime.developerToken('DEVELOPER_TOKEN'));
```

See [`docs/`](./docs/README.md) for the manager reference and the
authentication, pagination, and errors guides.
